request_payload.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our alliances work - or don't. The truth is, our partners aren't pulling their weight. We're stretched thin protecting others while they cut defense budgets. Remember when Germany only spent 1.2% of GDP on defense last year? That's not partnership. We need to make sure our commitments are reciprocated. Our security comes first.
